h1.visual_description: Inferred as larger, bold, possibly centered chapter titles (not present on this specific page).

h2.example_text: ARE CIGARETTE SMOKERS HYPERBOLIC TIME DISCOUNTERS?

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: In-text citation in blue hyperlinked text using Author-Year format.
Footnote text located at the bottom of the page, prefixed by a number and period.
Page footer containing the book/section title and the page number in the bottom right corner.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Bottom-right running footer (e.g., 'BEHAVIORAL ECONOMICS PRACTICUM 193'); bottom-aligned footnote blocks.
